---
title: "Layer by Layer"
listing:
  # Only real posts (index.qmd or chapter notebooks). Excludes drafts like _*.md beside a post.
  contents:
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/*.ipynb"
  sort:
    - "date desc"
    - "title desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: ../styles.css
---

This blog is all about me learning in public and sharing what I discover along the way. If something I write helps even one person understand a concept better, I'll consider this blog a success.
